title: Murugan Worship in Tamil Tradition
description: Lord Murugan has been worshipped across Tamil lands as the divine youth, warrior, teacher, and protector.

title: Murugan as Seyon
description: Tamil literary memory preserves Murugan as Seyon, connected with hills, courage, beauty, and devotion.

title: Six Sacred Abodes
description: The Arupadai Veedu tradition preserves six major sacred sites connected with Lord Murugan's grace and divine acts.

title: Songs, Slokas and Kavachams
description: Devotional works such as Kanda Sashti Kavacham and Thiruppugazh shaped Murugan worship for generations.

title: Hill Temples and Devotional Journeys
description: Murugan worship has long connected devotees through hill climbs, vows, fasting, and festival journeys.

title: Digital Devotional Learning
description: Om Saravana Bhava brings temples, festivals, slokas, learning paths, and verified spiritual guidance into a digital format.
